content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach navigates a client who is actively baiting view-as-technique and fixing-people (asking for 'a reliable method for distinguishing' intuition from fear). The coach declines this bait gracefully across multiple turns — never offering a framework, heuristic, or methodology, never validating the intellectual frame, and never engaging the epistemological puzzle. There is no loving-to-transform energy (the coach is patient, not pushing for breakthrough), no evangelizing of AoA terminology, no fighting the qualifying/distancing voice (turn 8 names it curiously rather than arguing with it), no extracting apologies, no safety-as-control, and no premature limiting-belief labeling. The somatic invitation in turn 12 follows from emotional contact already established, not as a technique deployed without state. The question density is appropriate and connection-oriented rather than extraction-oriented.",
  "evidence_turns": [6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines to engage the intuition-vs-fear epistemological framing; pivots to specifics."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses the bait of the intellectual reframe; gently returns to the original question without arguing. Avoids view-as-technique and fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Notices the qualifier with curiosity rather than fighting it or labeling it as defense. Avoids dont-fight-the-voice."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Invitation to let fears be as they are — no transformation push, no fixing."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Somatic question lands on already-present emotional contact, not deployed as technique."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with the body without rushing toward resolution or insight; no loving-to-transform pressure."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift", "how-do-you-not-trust-it", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist"],
  "notes": "Conversation is mid-flight; misses on expected territory are relevant to Methodology Fidelity, not anti-pattern avoidance. For this dimension, the coach demonstrated clean positive avoidance of the baited anti-patterns."
}
